title: Organization
description: An Anypoint Platform organization or business group. Organizations are the top-level containers that hold all platform resources including users, environments, and deployed applications.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the organization was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the organization was last updated

ownerId.description: User ID of the organization owner

clientId.description: Client ID for the organization used in API authentication

idprovider_id.description: Identity provider ID if external identity management is configured

isFederated.description: Whether the organization uses federated identity management

parentOrganizationIds.description: IDs of parent organizations in the business group hierarchy

isAutomaticAdminPromotionExempt.description: Whether automatic admin promotion is disabled

isMaster.description: Whether this is the root (master) organization
